name: nominal-marketplace
description: Nominal Industries plugin catalog: spicypowers (the spicy-brain operating layer) and nominalpowers (the engineering layer).

plugins.name: spicypowers
plugins.description: Skills for working with a spicy brain: brain-dump intake, status translation, chunking, transitions, thread archetypes, and persistent tracking artifacts. No code required.

plugins.name: nominalpowers
plugins.description: Engineering skills for Nominal Industries projects: the lead-thread workflow, subagent dispatch, external-validator discipline, staged TDD, and the Nominal Tauri scaffold.
